title: Very simple textures
description: A texturepack which adds simple textures for several popular blocks
body:
This is a minimalist texture pack designed to boost performance by replacing the most common blocks in Minecraft — cobblestone and grass — with low-resolution alternatives.

Perfect for players who want smoother gameplay, better FPS, or just a cleaner visual experience without changing the game's core look.

💡 Works with all modern and older versions

🔧 No OptiFine required. Drop it in your resourcepacks folder and enjoy!
